'''Elite Squadron''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] stationed on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] during the [[Bacta War]] as part of the [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]].

==History==
They were commanded by the ex-[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] pilot [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Erisi Dlarit]], a daughter of a prosperous scion in the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] trade industry and also a proficient pilot. Elite Squadron fought in the [[Battle of Thyferra]]. They were not assigned to actively engage the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces in orbit, but to escort the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] ''[[Thyfonian]]'' as it went to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Then, they would be picked up by the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.

However, they didn't succeed and they, along with the ''[[Thyfonian]]'', were destroyed by several [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of Rogue Squadron. They were pursued by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and several other X-wing pilots, when Erisi Dlarit destroyed [[Nawara Ven]]'s fighter with a salvo of laser cannon fire. The rest of the Rogue Squadron pilots broke out into dogfights with the less-skilled Elite Squadron pilots, leaving Corran Horn to kill Erisi Dlarit.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
